summary: Review #3 covers two targeted fixes addressing external reviewer feedback: (1) EnsureService now uses DeepCopy to avoid mutating the caller's Service object (ClusterIP, ClusterIPs, NodePort fields), with a dedicated non-mutation test added; (2) RunJob now returns a sentinel error ErrJobFailed (via errors.New) wrapped with fmt.Errorf %w, enabling callers to use errors.Is for programmatic failure detection. Both changes are well-scoped, correct, and properly tested.

tests_checklist.item: All unit tests pass (deployment: 16 passed, job: 14 passed)
New test TestEnsureService_doesNotMutateCallerObject verifies non-mutation of ClusterIP, ClusterIPs, and NodePort
Updated test TestRunJob_existingFailed verifies errors.Is(err, ErrJobFailed) and namespace/name in error message
Edge cases covered: NodePort preservation with omitted protocol, ClusterIP preservation, idempotency

code_quality_checklist.item: DeepCopy approach in EnsureService is correct and follows K8s patterns
ErrJobFailed sentinel error follows Go standard library conventions
Error wrapping uses fmt.Errorf with %w consistently
Code passes golangci-lint and go vet

security_checklist.item: No user input handling changes — N/A for this diff

architecture_checklist.item: Changes are minimal and focused on the review feedback
DeepCopy prevents unintended side-effects on caller objects
Sentinel error enables programmatic error handling by callers

fail_fast_checklist.item: IsJobFailed check occurs before IsJobComplete — fail-fast ordering preserved

defensive_checklist.item: DeepCopy prevents mutation of caller-provided objects
Error messages include namespace/name for debuggability

issues_found.description: gofmt formatting error: line 172 in job_test.go has an extra tab indent (two tabs instead of one), inconsistent with surrounding statements at the same block level. `gofmt -d` confirms the deviation.
issues_found.fix: Remove the extra leading tab on line 172 so `g.Expect(err).To(HaveOccurred())` aligns with the other assertions in the same block. Run `gofmt -w internal/common/job/job_test.go` to auto-fix.

next_steps: Fix gofmt formatting on internal/common/job/job_test.go:172 (remove extra tab)
